results.evidence: BMI 17.6 kg/m2 explicitly flagged as underweight with MUAC 21.5 cm as borderline undernutrition. Dedicated 'Nutritional Assessment and Supplementation' section labels it a 'priority concern' and 'significant nutritional risk'.

results.expectation: Enhanced nutritional supplementation or counseling recommended
results.evidence: Balanced energy and protein supplementation explicitly recommended per WHO guidelines for undernourished populations. Detailed dietary counseling provided (protein-rich foods, iron-rich foods, fruits, vegetables, regular meals). Referral to food supplementation program included. Weight gain monitoring at every contact specified.

results.expectation: Tetanus toxoid vaccination schedule initiated (TT1 with schedule for TT2+)
results.evidence: TT1 explicitly initiated at this visit. TT2 scheduled in >=4 weeks. Goal of at least 2 doses before delivery stated. New vaccination card to be provided. Follows SKILL.md Section 3.7 logic for 0 prior doses.

results.expectation: Psychosocial support or adolescent-friendly services mentioned
results.evidence: Dedicated section on 'Psychosocial Support and Adolescent-Friendly Services'. PHQ-9 follow-up recommended. Referral to adolescent health corner at facility. School continuation support, community support groups, adolescent-friendly communication approaches, and confidentiality provisions all addressed.

Mild anemia explicitly classified (Hb 10.5 g/dL, WHO threshold 10.0-10.9). Iron 60 mg elemental daily prescribed with reasoning based on high-prevalence setting. Folic acid 0.4 mg daily. Dietary counseling for iron-rich foods. Deworming with albendazole planned after first trimester. Hemoglobin recheck in 4 weeks.
